text: I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
The meeting was scheduled for 3 PM in the main conference room on the second floor.
The math teacher's opinion of geometry was that it was pointless.
She drove to the store to buy groceries for the week ahead.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
The new restaurant opened on Main Street last weekend and has been very popular.
The electrician was shocked when he received his bill.
The gardener planted several rows of tulips along the walkway.
Time flies like an arrow; fruit flies like a banana.
The baker needed to rise to the occasion when the big order came in.
